nodes.label: Modal with Navigation Options — Buscar TAG
nodes.norm_label: modal with navigation options — buscar tag

nodes.label: TAG Search Approach Options (Inline / Modal / Popover)
nodes.norm_label: tag search approach options (inline / modal / popover)

nodes.label: TAG Search Modal — Read-Only Cross-Source Lookup
nodes.rationale: Modal is read-only; editing is delegated to Equipos/Ingenieria screens to keep responsibilities separate and avoid concurrent edits. Searches both the equipment registry and the TAG extraction review queue simultaneously.
nodes.norm_label: tag search modal — read-only cross-source lookup

nodes.label: TAG Search — Inline Bar Always Visible (Option A)
nodes.rationale: Always-visible filter bar familiar to Excel users; filters table in real time. Trade-off: permanent space usage, no global cross-source search.
nodes.norm_label: tag search — inline bar always visible (option a)

nodes.label: TAG Search — Row-level Popover (Option C)
nodes.rationale: Contextual lupa icon per row opens popover without navigating away. Trade-off: requires locating the row first; ineffective for searching across a long list.

nodes.label: FASE B — Dynamic Versioned Forms Design
nodes.norm_label: fase b — dynamic versioned forms design

nodes.label: FASE C — Total Traceability System Design
nodes.norm_label: fase c — total traceability system design

nodes.label: Offline First — 100% Functionality Without Internet
nodes.rationale: Field devices in industrial plants (PTAR, PTAP, pump stations) often have no reliable connectivity. Offline First ensures technicians can execute protocols, capture evidence, and sign documents without network. Cloud is a mirror, not the source of truth.

nodes.label: RBAC + Row Level Security (RLS) in Postgres
nodes.rationale: Two-layer security: RBAC for coarse permissions (admin/supervisor/tecnico/cliente) and Postgres RLS for row-level data isolation between projects and companies.
nodes.norm_label: rbac + row level security (rls) in postgres

nodes.label: Sync Engine — Offline Outbox with Conflict Resolution
nodes.rationale: UUID v7 on client avoids collisions. Outbox queue in IndexedDB sends mutations in causal order on reconnect. Last-write-wins per field; manual resolution required for signatures and approvals.
nodes.norm_label: sync engine — offline outbox with conflict resolution

nodes.label: Audit Log — Append-Only Legal Traceability
nodes.rationale: Logical deletes (deleted_at) combined with trigger-populated audit_log satisfy industrial audit requirements (ISA-88, ISO 9001). Nothing is physically deleted.

nodes.label: Domain Hierarchy — Project → Area → System → Subsystem → Equipment → Test → Evidence
nodes.norm_label: domain hierarchy — project → area → system → subsystem → equipment → test → evidence

nodes.label: Form Version Lifecycle — Draft → Published → Deprecated → Archived
nodes.source_location: Section: FLUJO DE CICLO DE VIDA
nodes.rationale: Executed tests must always reference the frozen form_version_id used at execution time. Only one published version per template. Changes require cloning the published version to a new draft.
nodes.norm_label: form version lifecycle — draft → published → deprecated → archived

nodes.label: Legal Traceability — Who/What/When/Where for Industrial Protocols
nodes.rationale: Industrial commissioning requires juridical certainty: device used, GPS coordinates, protocol version, evidence hashes, and signature biometrics. occurred_at vs inserted_at dual timestamps support proving offline work was done before sync.
nodes.norm_label: legal traceability — who/what/when/where for industrial protocols

nodes.label: Dossier Automático — Final Contractual Commissioning Document
nodes.rationale: Dossier has legal validity; async generation in Supabase Edge Function assembles individual protocol PDFs via @react-pdf/renderer and concatenates with pdf-lib. 10-year retention required per EPC contract norms.
nodes.norm_label: dossier automatico — final contractual commissioning document

nodes.label: Document Revision Control — Rev 0/A/B Engineering Standard
nodes.norm_label: document revision control — rev 0/a/b engineering standard

nodes.label: Materialized View mv_project_stats — Server-Side KPI Aggregation
nodes.rationale: Addresses A-003 audit risk: instead of downloading 50k rows to the client for forEach counting, aggregation is done in PostgreSQL with COUNT GROUP BY, refreshed every 5 minutes via pg_cron.
nodes.norm_label: materialized view mv_project_stats — server-side kpi aggregation

nodes.label: Curva S — Planned vs Real Progress Over Time
nodes.norm_label: curva s — planned vs real progress over time

nodes.label: Table Partitioning — audit_log by Month, evidences by project_id Hash
nodes.rationale: audit_log is the fastest-growing table; monthly range partitions allow dropping old months. evidences uses hash(project_id) for even distribution across 4 partitions at 1M+ evidence scale.
nodes.norm_label: table partitioning — audit_log by month, evidences by project_id hash

nodes.label: Risk A-001 — RLS with JOINs per Row (Performance)
nodes.rationale: RLS helper functions execute SQL queries per evaluated row. Equipment policy does 3-table JOIN per row; 50k equipment triggers 150k+ operations causing timeouts. Fix: add project_id directly to equipment; cache identity with current_setting per session.
nodes.norm_label: risk a-001 — rls with joins per row (performance)

nodes.label: Risk A-002 — Pull Sync Without Pagination (Memory Crash)
nodes.rationale: pullChanges() has no LIMIT; on reconnect downloads ALL modified records. 50k equipment could be 50MB in mobile RAM. Fix: paginate 200 records per cycle with Dexie cursor.
nodes.norm_label: risk a-002 — pull sync without pagination (memory crash)

nodes.label: Risk A-006 — FK CASCADE Deletes Signed Protocols
nodes.rationale: Deleting equipment cascades to all signed protocols. Irreversible traceability loss; violates ISA-88 and ISO 9001. Fix: ON DELETE SET NULL + equipment_snapshot jsonb in tests.
nodes.norm_label: risk a-006 — fk cascade deletes signed protocols

nodes.label: Supabase Backend — PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage + Edge Functions
nodes.norm_label: supabase backend — postgresql + auth + storage + edge functions
